gap_notes: Native chain name is a placeholder.
TaoMarketCap and Tensorplex currently disagree on the SN117 source repository.
No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.

name: BrainPlay
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN117 using the BrainPlay repository, whose metadata identifies it as BrainPlay SN117. Public directory evidence is conflicting: TaoMarketCap points to a Chi repository while Tensorplex points to BrainPlay, and the native chain name is currently a placeholder. The BrainPlay surfaces are promoted as reviewed public evidence, but the identity conflict remains explicit.

surfaces.name: BrainPlay source repository
surfaces.notes: BrainPlay repository metadata identifies this as SN117, but public directory sources conflict.

surfaces.name: BrainPlay public app
surfaces.notes: Public BrainPlay app URL from repository homepage metadata.

surfaces.name: BrainPlay API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /api/health on play.shiftlayer.ai returning application liveness JSON. Served on the BrainPlay public app host declared as the GitHub repository homepage and registered website surface.

surfaces.name: BrainPlay Codenames miner deployment profile
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth JSON Targon serverless container spec for the SN117 Codenames competition, published in the official brainplay-subnet repository at deploy/profiles/codenames.json. Read by deploy/miner.py when miners pass --competition codenames to deploy and commit their model endpoint on-chain.

surfaces.name: BrainPlay leaderboard dashboard
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth web dashboard at play.shiftlayer.ai/leaderboard — the SN117 BrainPlay competition leaderboard (server-rendered ranked table of players with ELO ratings; page title "BrainPlay Leaderboard"). Served on the same play.shiftlayer.ai host as the subnet's registered public app (website) and /api/health API surfaces. Human-viewable dashboard page, distinct in kind and path from the JSON health endpoint.
